Variables.Name: Proxy
Variables.Description: The mesh proxy used to display this LOD

Variables.Name: Key
Variables.Description: The key used to validate this actor against the proxy

Variables.Name: LODDrawDistance
Variables.Description: what distance do you want this to show up instead of SubActors

Variables.Name: LODLevel
Variables.Description: The hierarchy level of this actor; the first tier of HLOD is level 1, the second tier is level 2 and so on.

Variables.Name: NumTrianglesInSubActors
Variables.Description: Cached number of triangles contained in the SubActors

Variables.Name: NumTrianglesInMergedMesh
Variables.Description: Cached number of triangles contained in the SubActors

Variables.Name: bOverrideMaterialMergeSettings
Variables.Description: Flag whether or not to use the override MaterialSettings when creating the proxy mesh

Variables.Name: MaterialSettings
Variables.Description: Override Material Settings, used when creating the proxy mesh

Variables.Name: bOverrideTransitionScreenSize
Variables.Description: Flag whether or not to use the override TransitionScreenSize for this proxy mesh

Variables.Name: TransitionScreenSize
Variables.Description:
Override transition screen size value, determines the screen size at which the proxy is visible
	  The screen size is based around the projected diameter of the bounding
	  sphere of the model. i.e. 0.5 means half the screen's maximum dimension.

Variables.Name: bOverrideScreenSize
Variables.Description: Flag whether or not to use the override ScreenSize when creating the proxy mesh

Variables.Name: ScreenSize
Variables.Description: Override screen size value used in mesh reduction, when creating the proxy mesh
